### 📝 Description
Provide a brief summary of what changes this PR introduces. What problem does it solve or what feature does it add?

### 🔗 Linked Issue
Closes # (Replace with the issue number this PR fixes, e.g., Closes #12)

### 🛠️ Type of Change
Select the option that applies best:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an unexpected issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX alignment or styling update
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (README, CONTRIBUTING guides, etc.)

### 🧪 Verification & Checklist
Before submitting, please make sure your PR checks off these items:
- [ ] My code uses strict TypeScript types and avoids using `any`
- [ ] All new UI elements are saved as `.tsx` components
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` locally and my code passes without errors
- [ ] Subpage metadata description is human-written and stays within the 50–55 character target limit

### 📸 Visual Evidence (If Applicable)
If your changes affect the layout, design, or responsive viewports, please drop screenshots or a quick GIF/video showing it off here.
